advisoryTeam.leftColumn_description1: European Management is a next-generation consulting company specialized in outsourced and digital management, offering selected clients high value-added solutions that are hard to find in the market.
advisoryTeam.leftColumn_description2: Operationally, it is structured into three distinct vertical business units, each composed of a specialized work team.
advisoryTeam.belowHero_paragraph: European Management is a consulting firm specializing in management and digital consulting. It offers selected clients high value-added solutions that are difficult to find on the market. It distances itself from traditional consulting models, proposes a "data driven" approach, and accepts challenging contracts, including "outcome based" ones, i.e. remunerated based on agreed performance indicators.
advisoryTeam.rightColumn_description1: European Management stands in contrast to traditional consulting models. It uses a data-driven and digital approach to automate complex business processes and accepts challenging contracts, including outcome-based ones, which are remunerated based on agreed performance indicators.
advisoryTeam.videoPlaceholder_caption: VIDEO / GIF – Edilmanager CRM, OSINT, Quality Monitor, Citizen Satisfaction…
advisoryTeam.boldText_managementTypes: outsourced management, digital services, and training

footer_contact_description: To interact with our offices and work with us, a reference from an existing client or partner company is required.

AboutTeamSection.about_paragraph1: European Management is a strategic and directional consulting company that supports businesses, public bodies and organisations in the management and communication of complex projects.
AboutTeamSection.about_paragraph2: Directional outsourcing is a practice mainly adopted by large companies in a phase of growth or change, which choose to entrust experienced external managers with turnkey project management or the achievement of specific objectives: extraordinary operations, tenders and contracts, market development and digitalisation are the most frequent areas of action.
AboutTeamSection.about_paragraph3: The goal of clients is to increase efficiency and focus attention on core business. It is an increasingly widespread practice in light of ongoing economic, social and technological changes, which require new skills and speed of action. Factors that are often difficult to achieve for many companies structured using exclusively internal resources and procedures.
AboutTeamSection.about_paragraph4: The company also specialises, with the same approach, in the analysis of public policies. In scientific collaboration with the Quaeris research institute, European Management develops and distributes digital tools that help administrations and public decision-makers to analyse citizen sentiment, process and leverage large amounts of data, monitor the effectiveness of public policies and evaluate the quality of services delivered. The combined use of machine learning and digital tools applied to data enables administrations to better understand the needs of the population and to guide their decisions with greater awareness.
AboutTeamSection.about_paragraph5: In 2021, following growing demand, Edilmanager was established within the company, a team of expert advisors coordinated by Edoardo Genovesi, dedicated to the infrastructure and redevelopment sector. The team works on process digitalisation, market development and management control. Thanks to custom-developed software made available to clients, integrated remote control and operational planning services are also offered from smartphones. The business unit is completed with a tool dedicated to the automation of quotations through artificial intelligence and the automated management of commercial procedures for lead generation and management.
AboutTeamSection.about_paragraph6: In 2024, activities were further expanded with the creation of the Out of Office business unit, managed by Isabel Tonelli, an expert in influencer marketing, focused on integrated corporate communication, events and market development.
AboutTeamSection.about_paragraph7: Besides being a consulting company, European Management can also be considered an international network of managers, decision makers and experts active in various sectors: from energy to technology, from robotics to cybersecurity, to European policies, security and the environment. Such a network facilitates the building of European partnerships, the matching of win-win operations, the search for investors and the creation of high-profile executive training programmes.

outsourced_management.title: OUTSOURCED MANAGEMENT
outsourced_management.intro: Outsourced management is a practice mainly adopted by large companies in growth or change phases, choosing to entrust experienced external managers or specialized companies with turnkey project management or the achievement of specific objectives: extraordinary operations, finance, market development, public tenders/contracts, digitalization, and much more. The goal of clients is to increase efficiency and focus attention on core business.
outsourced_management.intro1: It is an increasingly widespread practice in light of epochal economic, social, and technological changes that require new skills and rapid action. Complex factors to obtain for many companies structured with only internal resources and procedures.
outsourced_management.intro2: For this reason, European Management specializes in supporting Italian and multinational companies with outsourced management assignments to manage
outsourced_management.introC: in specific geographical areas, innovation and

digital_management.title: Digital for Business Management
digital_management.intro: Since 2021, E.M.I. has dedicated a specific team to the digitalization of processes through custom-made software based on machine learning and artificial intelligence. Specifically, procedures have been automated for: site inspections, offer studies, metric calculations, management control, logistics tracking, CO2 emissions monitoring, robotic production, and much more. The challenge is to support companies and business networks in managing internal and external procedures more efficiently and economically, achieving growth and scalability objectives.
list: process automation through custom software based on machine learning
digital_management.outro: The challenge is to support companies, cooperatives, and business networks in achieving their growth objectives with a data-driven digital approach in a sector typically not accustomed to change

digital_resources.title: Digital for Resource Optimization
digital_resources.intro: European Management with digitalization makes business processes leaner and more controllable while promoting ecological transition. How?
list: Through measurement and traceability of environmental impact (Carbontrack project)
Through integration of hardware and software for robotized production (ATI Dolomiti Grow for Defense Industries Agencies tender)
Through database integration for information research from open sources (OSINT DB project)
digital_resources.outro: These are just some of the digital solutions supporting business management that we have created and implemented to fulfill our

public_policy.title: PUBLIC POLICY
public_policy.subtitle: Digital solutions for governments and local authorities
public_policy.description: We provide local authorities, governments, and public administrations with next-generation statistical and IT tools that enable strategic decisions to be made in an informed and conscious way.
public_policy.intro: Our solutions, developed in scientific partnership with Quaeris, a renowned Italian research institute, enable public decision-makers to make informed decisions and plan government strategies thanks to greater knowledge and information.

modules.line2: Digital and AI for market insights

citizen_satisfaction.title: Citizen Satisfaction:
citizen_satisfaction.intro: This is an evolving mapping over time of citizens' sentiment on specific topics of interest, segmented into homogeneous categories and divided by geographical area. Its application can be at the municipal, provincial, regional, or national level. In the case of specific topics (e.g., transport, healthcare, public services..), the analysis will be vertical and in-depth, while if there are no specific topics of interest, the analysis starts with a general screening divided by economic sectors and services defined together with the client. Thanks to the data collected, public decision-makers can increasingly understand the real opinions, positions, and needs of citizens and consequently make better political decisions.

quality_monitor.title: Quality Monitor:
quality_monitor.intro: Thanks to innovative custom-developed software, we help public, semi-public, and private companies understand their real daily impact on users. The system daily submits ad hoc questionnaires on satisfaction and service quality to all customers interacting with the client's offices, collecting detailed insights that automatically populate an interactive graphic dashboard. We replace with intelligent software the work usually done by an entire department of analysts. Thanks to the always up-to-date reports in real time, we support management in understanding the actual quality of the services provided, facilitating the comparison of companies in the same sector and between similar sectors using standard parameters.

microtargeting_ai.title: Microtargeting with Artificial Intelligence (AI)
microtargeting_ai.intro: This is a survey system that combines data analysis, social psychology, and artificial intelligence. It segments the population into extremely precise opinion groups and customizes promotional communication messages based on real values, emotions, and needs. While traditional surveys offer static numbers, microtargeting creates dynamic profiles, processing huge amounts of data in real time. The process starts with the collection of qualitative and quantitative data through: individual interviews or focus groups, open surveys, web listening (social, forums, search engines).. AI processes this data to identify recurring patterns: motivations, fears, common languages, and value references. From these patterns, 'opinion personas' are born, i.e., synthetic but realistic profiles representing different segments of the public. Example:
list: 'Marco, 42, pragmatic technician, distrustful of politics but sensitive to efficiency and merit.'
'Sara, 28, idealistic student, oriented towards sustainability and social justice.'
microtargeting_ai.intro1: Once the 'opinion personas' are defined, AI microtargeting allows you to: model different messages for each group, using language, values, and symbols that resonate with each identity, automatically test the emotional and cognitive response to content, optimize the dissemination of messages on the digital channels most frequented by each 'persona', and much more.. In short, AI microtargeting allows you to:
list1: reduce communication waste (speak only to those who are potentially interested);
obtain a higher return in terms of consensus, sales, or engagement.
